What's inside

Everything you want to track, nothing you don't.

🌙

Cycle tracking

Log your period, track symptoms, and understand your cycle with clear predictions and no algorithms selling your data.

🏋️

Workout logging

Build and log workouts with sets, reps, and cardio. Track progress over time with a personal exercise library.

🥗

Nutrition tracking

Log meals and monitor nutrition without obsession. Olive shows you patterns, not judgment.

💧

Hydration reminders

Set daily water goals and get gentle nudges throughout the day. Small habits, real difference.

🎯

Wellness goals

Set intentions, not metrics. Olive helps you build habits that actually fit your life.

🔒

Private by design

Your health data stays yours. No ads. No selling. No sharing. Encrypted in transit, always.

Our philosophy

Every food in moderation. A guiding principle, not a rule.

— The Olive way

E Every Nothing is off-limits
F Food Nourishment, not numbers
I In Within your own rhythm
M Moderation Balance, not restriction

Ready to meet Olive?

A wellness app that respects you; your data, your pace, and your definition of healthy.
